title: Doc's Table API - Increase Limit
excerpt:
We’re building an app that creates a doc with a table in it. As of today the doc’s table API allows to create tables of up to 5 rows and 5 column. 
Allowing to create up to 5x5 table doesn’t make sense. What type of data…

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re building an app that creates a doc with a table in it. As of today the doc’s table API allows to create tables of up to 5 rows and 5 column.
Allowing to create up to 5x5 table doesn’t make sense. What type of data could fit into that? What’s the logic behind this limitation? Not to mention the fact that in the UI, as a user, I can create more than 5.
Obviously there should be some limitation but what’s the use case behind 5x5? Please expand it to a few 10s, 40? 50? 100?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Fantasy-Media-Team,

Thank you for the request to change this in the future!

Everyone: Remember you can vote for this at the top left corner of the screen!
